title: SQL: decimal handling errors
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id Int32, value Decimal(10, 4) DEFAULT NULL);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, value) VALUES (1, toDecimal64(1.12345, 4));
INSERT INTO test_table (id, value) VALUES (2, toDecimal64(1.1234, 4));
INSERT INTO test_table (id, value) VALUES (3, NULL);
SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
key_bug_features: Inserting decimals with more than four decimal places
